data.title: GitHub's Copilot Chat improves with advanced repository management, boosting code editing and workflow efficiency, offering new features like file creation and updates. Explore now!

Explore the new features and enhancements in repository management with Copilot Chat for an improved coding experience.

data.title: Mill City Ventures' $450M investment launches Nasdaq-listed SUI Treasury, broadening Sui blockchain access.
